title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at DSV India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at DSV India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
DSV India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Distribution Manager at our Mumbai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About DSV India:
DSV India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DSV India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
